title: abies vejarii subsp. macrocarpa
intro: Abies vejarii subsp. macrocarpa, also known as the Guadalupe fir, is a subspecies of coniferous tree native to the state of Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Abies vejarii subsp. macrocarpa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe sore throats and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and tinctures that can be used in aromatherapy, teas, or topical applications to promote relaxation and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
